A hybrid approach of robust cloud engines and standard Ethereum consensus.

## Hybrid Consensus & Server Design

To ensure optimal performance and security, Cosmicrafts uses a split-plane hybrid architecture:

```
┌─────────────────────────────────┐
│     Centralized Cloud Server    │ <--- Matchmaking, Player Profiles,
│  (No Gas, Zero Latency, 60 FPS) │      Real-time Battle State Engine
└────────────────┬────────────────┘
                 │
                 │ State Proofs
                 ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────┐
│        Ethereum Mainnet         │ <--- ERC-20 SPIRAL Token,
│      (Secure, Permanent)        │      Immutable Asset Ledgers
└─────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 1. Centralized Cloud Engine
- **Gameplay Matchmaking**: Player matchmaking, game state calculation, and leaderboard updates are hosted on specialized, high-performance cloud servers.
- **Frictionless Experience**: Players can enjoy the fully featured 3D game client without needing a crypto wallet connected for every action, resulting in **zero transaction latency and zero gas fees** during play.

### 2. Decentralized Asset Layer (Ethereum)
- **SPIRAL ERC-20 Token**: The financial foundation of the franchise is deployed on the Ethereum mainnet.
- **Permanent Ledger Storage**: Ethereum provides an indestructible smart contract environment. No single entity, including the development team, can alter or shut down the ledger state, giving investors and holders total transparency and security.

The next chapter of the Cosmicrafts gaming franchise.

## The Pivot

After years of pushing the boundaries of fully on-chain Web3 gaming ecosystems, we have reached a critical realization. Delivering a premium, zero-latency gaming experience alongside a stable, secure, and permanent token ledger requires extreme focus and architectural simplicity.

We are shifting our primary technical infrastructure:
- **Deprecating ICP canisters**: Managing complex, fully on-chain game state engines on Internet Computer canisters has proven to be high-maintenance, costly, and subject to severe cycle-depletion risks. 
- **Transitioning to High-Performance Cloud + Ethereum**: All matchmaking, player profiles, and multiplayer battle states are now being centralized on state-of-the-art hybrid cloud servers, eliminating in-game gas fees and latency. 
- **Standard ERC-20 Token**: The `SPIRAL` token will be launched on **Ethereum Mainnet**, guaranteeing the deepest liquidity, absolute developer transparency, and permanent ledger stability that will live forever without cycle management.

## The Mission

Our focus remains unchanged: delivering a fully functional, breathtaking space RTS game built for both competitive Web3 and mainstream players. By simplifying the stack, we are shrinking our operation to a highly efficient Minimum Viable Project (MVP) to successfully launch the token and reward our community and early backers.

The Pivot

After years of pushing the boundaries of fully on-chain Web3 gaming ecosystems, we have reached a critical realization. Delivering a premium, zero-latency gaming experience alongside a stable, secure, and permanent token ledger requires extreme focus and architectural simplicity.

We are shifting our primary technical infrastructure:

  • Deprecating ICP canisters: Managing complex, fully on-chain game state engines on Internet Computer canisters has proven to be high-maintenance, costly, and subject to severe cycle-depletion risks.
  • Transitioning to High-Performance Cloud + Ethereum: All matchmaking, player profiles, and multiplayer battle states are now being centralized on state-of-the-art hybrid cloud servers, eliminating in-game gas fees and latency.
  • Standard ERC-20 Token: The SPIRAL token will be launched on Ethereum Mainnet, guaranteeing the deepest liquidity, absolute developer transparency, and permanent ledger stability that will live forever without cycle management.

Symmetric and fair SPIRAL token distribution strategy on Ethereum.

## Token Distribution Strategy

Total Fixed Supply: **1,000,000,000 SPIRAL Tokens (1 Billion)**

To align incentives and protect early backers who supported our vision through the years, we have restructured the allocation to fully prioritize our seed investors while ensuring founders' tokens remain dedicated to scaling the MVP.

| Allocation Group | Percentage | Token Allocation | Purpose & Vesting Terms |
| :--- | :---: | :---: | :--- |
| **Seed Investors** | **2.6%** | **26,000,000** | Fully preserved, non-diluted, and honored. |
| **Former Team** | **1.3%** | **13,000,000** | Capped at exactly half of the Seed Investors' share to protect investor significance. |
| **Founders & Treasury** | **96.1%** | **961,000,000** | Retained by founders and treasury, vested to guarantee server scaling, marketing, and market-making liquidity. |

## Why Ethereum (ERC-20)?

Deploying our token on Ethereum guarantees:
- **Maximum Liquidity**: Access to the largest decentralized exchanges (DEXs) like Uniswap.
- **Absolute Longevity**: Unlike sovereign subnet chains or cycle-reliant networks, Ethereum is a permanent utility ledger. Your tokens will exist as long as the Ethereum blockchain exists.
- **Simple Wallets**: Direct compatibility with standard mobile and browser wallets (MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, etc.) for a friction-free claim and staking dashboard experience.
